raw_ground_truth.loss_run_label: Consolidated Loss Summary (prepared by Texas Commercial Insurance Partners)

description.value: A main electrical transformer failed in the basement storage area, resulting in damage to servers, networking gear, and stored data at 8117 Preston Road, Dallas, TX
Lightning struck the communications antenna and wiring, causing damage to the elevator controller and emergency lighting at 800 8th Avenue, Fort Worth, TX
Vandals spray-painted graffiti across the exterior walls at the employee break room, causing damage at 5060 Westheimer Road, Houston, TX

denial_reason.value: Failure to provide proof of loss within statutory period

risk_management.question: Are written contracts with indemnification required from all contractors?
Is there any commercial occupancy within the building?
Is there 24-hour doorperson or security on premises?
Are short-term rentals (less than 1 year) permitted?
Are EV charging stations installed on the premises?
What percentage of units are regularly occupied vs. vacant?
Is the building fully sprinklered per NFPA 13 or 13R?
Are there swimming pools, exercise rooms, or other amenities?
When was the last plumbing, HVAC, and electrical system update?
Are fire alarms hard-wired with central station monitoring?
Have there been any OSHA citations in the past 3 years?
